notes: Breadth is high due to comprehensive coverage of projects, timesheets, invoicing, expenses, and user management; auth confirmed via Composio registry. [human-verified: Both OAuth2 and PAT confirmed. Free plan (1 seat 2 projects). PAT at id.getharvest.com instantly.]
